title: En la Hacienda de la Flor
writer: Ernesto Cortázar, Ramón Pérez Peláez, Ignacio Villareal
actors: Pedro Armendáriz, Rosario Dúrcal, Fernando Soto
plot: Juan Robledo returns to his town and his girlfriend, but her brothers, Fernando and Felipe, reject him for not being of the same social class.
